generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder directly mounted on motor for measuring motor shaft rotation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted behind the gearbox for measuring output angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentData
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from motor current and encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration derived from encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from CurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data measured by motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data measured by secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxisSysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural description of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxisSysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for behavioral description of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for motor behavior with Coulomb-Viscous and Stribeck friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for gearwheel behavior with Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for cycloidal gearbox behavior with LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for creating and managing SysML models of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for running Simulink simulations of motor and gearbox behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking and traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tool for integrated visualization of friction parameters and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction parameters using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionParameterInsight, KineticFrictionParameterInsight, ViscousFrictionParameterInsight, SimulationDeviationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction parameters and simulation results in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computational processes for robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityInsight
]

instance SysMLModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "SysML model creation and management insight"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streaming insight"
]

instance StaticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static friction parameter identification for robot joint control"
]

instance KineticFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Kinetic friction parameter identification for robot joint control"
]

instance ViscousFrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Viscous friction parameter identification for robot joint control"
]

instance SimulationDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from deviations between simulated and measured data for control algorithm refinement"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of friction parameters for decision-making"
]

instance TraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data sources and computational processes"
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for creating and managing SysML models of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelingInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for MQTT data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis with motor and two gearboxes (gearwheel and cycloidal), functional reach of 2 m, path repeatability of 0.06 mm, positional accuracy of 0.1 mm, used for machining tasks"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis components"
    base:contains RobotFirstAxis
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is a passive entity with one-way data flow, thus no data is transmitted from the virtual to the physical system."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A passive digital shadow orchestration where physical sensors stream data via MQTT to a virtual model composed of SysML structural descriptions, Simulink simulation models for friction and motor behavior, Asset Administration Shells for data traceability, and a dashboard for visualization, all focused on continuous friction identification for motion accuracy improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, with continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation to account for wear and varying conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data (input current, position) from physical robot to virtual digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial automation standards, SysML for system modeling, and adherence to Industrie 4.0 standards for digital twin implementation."
]
